    A

    apply(float) - Method in enum class fasttween.Ease
     
    apply(float) - Method in interface fasttween.EaseFunction
    Applies the easing function to the input value.

    B

    BACK_OUT - Enum constant in enum class fasttween.Ease
    Overshoots slightly then settles back.
    BOUNCE_OUT - Enum constant in enum class fasttween.Ease
    Bouncing effect like a ball.

    C

    clamp01(float) - Static method in class fasttween.Interpolation
    Clamps a value to the range [0.0, 1.0].
    CUBIC_IN - Enum constant in enum class fasttween.Ease
    Accelerating from zero velocity (smoother).
    CUBIC_IN_OUT - Enum constant in enum class fasttween.Ease
    Acceleration until halfway, then deceleration (smoother).
    CUBIC_OUT - Enum constant in enum class fasttween.Ease
    Decelerating to zero velocity (smoother).
    currentValue() - Method in class fasttween.Tween
    Returns the current interpolated value without updating.

    D

    duration(long) - Method in class fasttween.Tween
    Sets the duration of this tween.

    E

    ease(EaseFunction) - Method in class fasttween.Tween
    Sets the easing function for this tween.
    Ease - Enum Class in fasttween
    Built-in easing functions for FastTween.
    EaseFunction - Interface in fasttween
    Functional interface for custom easing functions.
    ELASTIC_OUT - Enum constant in enum class fasttween.Ease
    Elastic snap effect.
    EXPO_OUT - Enum constant in enum class fasttween.Ease
    Extreme fast start, gentle landing.

    F

    fasttween - package fasttween
     
    FastTween - Class in fasttween
    FastTween - Ultra-fast native Java tweening engine.
    from(float, long) - Static method in class fasttween.FastTween
    Creates a tween from the current value to 0.
    fromTo(float, float) - Method in class fasttween.Tween
    Sets the start and end values for this tween.
    fromTo(float, float, long) - Static method in class fasttween.FastTween
    Creates a tween with explicit from/to values.

    G

    getDuration() - Method in class fasttween.Tween
    Returns the duration in milliseconds.
    getEndValue() - Method in class fasttween.Tween
    Returns the end value.
    getStartValue() - Method in class fasttween.Tween
    Returns the start value.

    I

    Interpolation - Class in fasttween
    Mathematical interpolation utilities.
    isComplete() - Method in class fasttween.Tween
    Checks if this tween has completed.
    isRunning() - Method in class fasttween.Tween
    Checks if this tween is currently running.

    L

    lerp(double, double, float) - Static method in class fasttween.Interpolation
    Linear interpolation between two double values.
    lerp(float, float, float) - Static method in class fasttween.Interpolation
    Linear interpolation between two float values.
    lerp(int, int, float) - Static method in class fasttween.Interpolation
    Linear interpolation between two int values.
    LINEAR - Enum constant in enum class fasttween.Ease
    Constant velocity.

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class fasttween.FastTween
    Main entry point for demo/testing.

    O

    onComplete(Runnable) - Method in class fasttween.Tween
    Sets a callback to be invoked when the tween completes.
    onUpdate(Consumer) - Method in class fasttween.Tween
    Sets a callback to be invoked on each update.

    Q

    QUAD_IN - Enum constant in enum class fasttween.Ease
    Accelerating from zero velocity.
    QUAD_IN_OUT - Enum constant in enum class fasttween.Ease
    Acceleration until halfway, then deceleration.
    QUAD_OUT - Enum constant in enum class fasttween.Ease
    Decelerating to zero velocity.
    QUART_OUT - Enum constant in enum class fasttween.Ease
    Fast deceleration for snappy movements.

    R

    reset() - Method in class fasttween.Tween
    Resets this tween to its initial state without starting it.

    S

    smootherstep(float) - Static method in class fasttween.Interpolation
    Smootherstep interpolation (6t⁵ - 15t⁴ + 10t³).
    smoothstep(float) - Static method in class fasttween.Interpolation
    Smoothstep interpolation (3t² - 2t³).
    start() - Method in class fasttween.Tween
    Starts or restarts this tween from the beginning.
    stop() - Method in class fasttween.Tween
    Stops this tween immediately.

    T

    to(float, float, long) - Static method in class fasttween.FastTween
    Creates a tween from a starting value to an ending value.
    to(float, long) - Static method in class fasttween.FastTween
    Creates a tween from 0 to the specified value.
    Tween - Class in fasttween
    A single tween instance that interpolates a value over time.

    U

    update() - Method in class fasttween.Tween
    Updates this tween.

    V

    valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class fasttween.Ease
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    values() - Static method in enum class fasttween.Ease
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
    VERSION - Static variable in class fasttween.FastTween
